room.name: a spur tunnel under the Pentonville district.
room.description: Rust streaks the walls of this neglected spur. The air feels heavy, full of dread. Graffiti scratched into the tiles reads: "Thought is free".

room.name: by the Miniluv access hatch
room.description: The tunnel ends in a brutal concrete wall with a single reinforced hatch. A camera lens blinks red above it, watching silently.

room.name: a Detention Antechamber
room.description: A narrow chamber lined with peeling grey paint. Rusted shackles hang from the wall, and the faint stink of disinfectant lingers. Someone has scratched a message into the plaster: "THEY WERE HERE."

room.name: a Watchers' Alcove
room.description: A cramped alcove with a smashed telescreen on the floor, wires spilling like entrails. A desk is scattered with broken handcuffs and yellowing interrogation reports.
